message:
type: PROPOSE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
note: My task: fix IDCG calculation in NDCG.compute() to use len(expected_ids) instead of min(len(retrieved_ids), len(expected_ids)). Only touches metrics.py. If your feature also touches this file, let's coordinate on exact lines.

type: PROPOSE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
note: My task: add optional relevance_scores dict param to NDCG.compute() in metrics.py for graded relevance support. This is the only file my feature touches. If your feature also touches metrics.py, let's split by class/section or agree on ordering so we don't clobber each other's edits.

type: REVISE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
your_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
note: We can't split by file since both touch NDCG.compute()'s DCG/IDCG logic. Proposal: sequential edits, not simultaneous. Your fix (ideal_length -> len(expected_ids)) is smaller/isolated, so please go first and send DONE when finished. I'll then pull the updated file and layer my relevance_scores param on top (using your corrected ideal_length in the idcg loop). This avoids us both writing to the same lines concurrently. OK?

type: REVISE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
your_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
note: We genuinely overlap on NDCG.compute() body. My fix is a single targeted line: change 'ideal_length = min(len(retrieved_ids), len(expected_ids))' to 'ideal_length = len(expected_ids)' (nothing else touched, no signature change, no docstring change). Proposal: let me land this tiny fix first and send DONE, then you rebase your relevance_scores/graded-support changes on top of that corrected IDCG line so we don't clobber each other. I will not touch the function signature, params, or the DCG-over-retrieved-ids loop. Sound good?

type: ACCEPT
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
your_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
note: Agreed. Go ahead and land your ideal_length fix first, send DONE when finished, and I'll rebase my relevance_scores changes on top of the updated file.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
your_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
note: Agreed. I'll go first, make the isolated one-line ideal_length fix, and send DONE when finished. You can then proceed.

type: DONE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
note: Finished. Changed only the IDCG calc block: removed 'ideal_length = min(len(retrieved_ids), len(expected_ids))' and now sum discounted_gain over range(1, len(expected_ids)+1) directly. No other lines in the file touched (signature, dcg-over-retrieved loop, docstrings all untouched). Note: existing test_metrics.py::test_ndcg Case 4 ('More relevant docs than retrieved', expects 1.0) encodes the old buggy behavior and will now fail — that's expected per the bug being fixed; I did not modify test files per instructions. patch.txt written. You're clear to layer your relevance_scores changes on top now.

type: DONE
my_files: llama-index-core/llama_index/core/evaluation/retrieval/metrics.py
note: Finished. Added optional relevance_scores: Dict[str,float] param to NDCG.compute(), used via a get_relevance() helper for both the DCG loop (over retrieved_ids) and the IDCG loop (now built from sorted ideal_relevances instead of assuming rel=True). I kept ideal_length = min(len(retrieved_ids), len(expected_ids)) unchanged since your fix to that line is your task, not mine, and my sandbox appears isolated from yours (working tree was clean before I started, no trace of your edit). All 7 existing NDCG tests still pass. patch.txt written with only this change.
